reason: First controlled beta test completed with 8 synthetic student personas. Mission checker encoding bug identified and fixed mid-test.

STU-001 (BETA-NMY3FS).note: Blocked by mission checker encoding bug (UTF-8 vs cp1252 on Windows)

STU-002 (BETA-39NCBT).note: Passed after encoding fix applied. First attempt failed due to lingering encoding issue.

STU-003 (BETA-9CXMLZ).note: Simulated struggling student: 3 failures, 1 hint, then success

STU-004 (BETA-Q6GYG8).note: Simulated hint-dependent student: 2 failures, 2 hints, then success

STU-005 (BETA-GNTMDV).note: Simulated error recovery: 1 failure then success without hints

STU-006 (BETA-TNAN6J).note: Returning student: completed lesson 1-1, advanced to lesson 1-2

STU-007 (BETA-ZSLKNE).note: Quick abandon: code generated but no lessons started

STU-008 (BETA-XNA5JV).note: Cross-device: code generated on different device, no progress yet

observed_friction_points: Mission checker fails on Windows when code contains non-ASCII characters (cp1252 encoding)
Beta landing 'Продолжить обучение' navigation may not fire reliably via automated clicks
Onboarding redirect to lesson after skip requires manual navigation
No visible feedback for 'Что выведет код?' quiz question — state update not detectable via snapshot

analytics_quality.note: Analytics system working correctly. 8 distinct event types verified. No external requests or personal data leaks detected.
